penalties.description: Task appears incomplete as the final frame shows objects still on the right side with instruction to move all pegs back to left side.

reasoning: The video shows clear outbound transfers from left to right side completing around frame 14 at 03:03, then return transfers begin. However, the final frame at 03:45 still shows objects on the right side with instructions to complete the return phase, indicating the task was not fully completed within the observed timeframe. The incomplete_task penalty results in automatic zero score per FLS rubric.
